mapper.select: SELECT * FROM UB_ADMIN WHERE admin_id = #{adminId} and admin_pw = #{adminPw}
SELECT count(*) FROM UB_MEMBER WHERE MEMBER_TYPE = 'MENTOR'
SELECT count(*) FROM UB_MEMBER WHERE MEMBER_TYPE = 'MENTEE'
SELECT count(*) FROM UB_MATCHING WHERE MATCHING_STATE = '매칭중'
SELECT * FROM ( SELECT umb.board_title, umb.board_date FROM UB_MENTEE_BOARD umb UNION ALL SELECT umb.board_title, umb.board_date FROM UB_MENTOR_BOARD umb ORDER BY board_date) WHERE ROWNUM <= 5
SELECT * FROM ( SELECT MEMBER_NAME, MEMBER_type, member_date FROM UB_MEMBER ORDER BY member_date) WHERE ROWNUM <= 5

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM AS rnum, subquery.* FROM ( SELECT umb.menteeboard_number, board_title, board_click, board_date, CASE WHEN umb.admin_number IS NOT NULL THEN ua.admin_Nickname WHEN umb.MEMBER_number IS NOT NULL THEN um.MEMBER_nickname END AS "write_nickname" FROM UB_MENTEE_BOARD umb LEFT JOIN UB_MEMBER um ON um.MEMBER_NUMBER = umb.MEMBER_NUMBER LEFT JOIN UB_ADMIN UA ON umb.admin_number = ua.admin_number ORDER BY umb.MENTEEBOARD_NUMBER desc ) subquery )WHERE rnum BETWEEN #{startRow} AND #{endRow}

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM AS rnum, subquery.* FROM ( SELECT umb.menteeboard_number, board_title, board_click, board_date, CASE WHEN umb.admin_number IS NOT NULL THEN ua.admin_Nickname WHEN umb.MEMBER_number IS NOT NULL THEN um.MEMBER_nickname END AS "write_nickname" FROM UB_MENTEE_BOARD umb LEFT JOIN UB_MEMBER um ON um.MEMBER_NUMBER = umb.MEMBER_NUMBER LEFT JOIN UB_ADMIN UA ON umb.admin_number = ua.admin_number WHERE board_date BETWEEN TO_DATE(#{dateFrom}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AND TO_DATE(#{dateTo}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') ORDER BY umb.MENTEEBOARD_NUMBER desc ) subquery )WHERE rnum BETWEEN #{startRow} AND #{endRow}

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM AS rnum, subquery.* FROM ( SELECT umb.mentorboard_number, board_title, board_click, board_date, CASE WHEN umb.admin_number IS NOT NULL THEN ua.admin_Nickname WHEN umb.MEMBER_number IS NOT NULL THEN um.MEMBER_nickname END AS "write_nickname" FROM UB_MENTOR_BOARD umb LEFT JOIN UB_MEMBER um ON um.MEMBER_NUMBER = umb.MEMBER_NUMBER LEFT JOIN UB_ADMIN UA ON umb.admin_number = ua.admin_number ORDER BY umb.MENTORBOARD_NUMBER desc ) subquery )WHERE rnum BETWEEN #{startRow} AND #{endRow}

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM AS rnum, subquery.* FROM ( SELECT umb.mentorboard_number, board_title, board_click, board_date, CASE WHEN umb.admin_number IS NOT NULL THEN ua.admin_Nickname WHEN umb.MEMBER_number IS NOT NULL THEN um.MEMBER_nickname END AS "write_nickname" FROM UB_MENTOR_BOARD umb LEFT JOIN UB_MEMBER um ON um.MEMBER_NUMBER = umb.MEMBER_NUMBER LEFT JOIN UB_ADMIN UA ON umb.admin_number = ua.admin_number WHERE board_date BETWEEN TO_DATE(#{dateFrom}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AND TO_DATE(#{dateTo}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') ORDER BY umb.MENTORBOARD_NUMBER desc ) subquery )WHERE rnum BETWEEN #{startRow} AND #{endRow}
